name: Cheese Tart
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon saffron threads dissolved in boiling water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Blanch swiss chard in boiling water for one minute; drain and squeeze out excess moisture. Transfer to a mixing bowl.
3. Add basil, cheeses, and four eggs to the bowl. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
4. Incorporate half of the saffron mixture and softened butter.
5. Fill the prebaked tart shell with the cheese mixture.
6. Bake for 15 minutes.
7. Beat remaining egg with remaining saffron. Spoon over the surface of the tart.
8. Continue baking for 20 minutes longer or until puffy.
Yield: 8 servings
